notes: Iter 8: MODERATE R1 + iter-7 defensive R2/R3. R1 TQQQ raw [0.4, 0.7] (was [0.85,1.0] in iter6/7) → normalized ~33-58% TQQQ. R1 band slightly wider [4%, 8%] (was [3%,6%]) to capture more compounding. Diagnosis: iter 5-7 showed ultra-aggressive R1 traded ~5% CAGR for ~3% extra DD; the leverage decay during slow drawdowns wasn't worth it. Test whether moderate R1 + defensive R2/R3 unlocks the worst-DD target.
